user.title: Smart EV Charging
user.description: Choose a name for this EV. You can install the integration multiple times for multiple cars.

price.title: Price source
price.description: Pick the entity that holds your hourly prices in an attribute. Defaults are tuned for Strømligning. Found fields: {peek}

charger.title: Charger
charger.description: Pick the switch that turns charging on/off and set the effective charging power.

car.title: Car (optional)
car.description: All fields are optional. Skipping any of them creates a fallback entity instead.

data.actively_charging_values: Status values that mean actively charging

defaults.title: Defaults
defaults.description: Default departure time and planning behavior. Editable later via Configure.

data.min_minutes_left_in_hour: Skip current hour if less than N minutes remain
data.min_soc_threshold: Only charge if SoC is below (%) — 100 disables the gate

error.entity_not_found: Entity does not exist or is not exposed.
error.attribute_not_found: The attribute was not found on the entity.
error.attribute_not_a_list: The attribute exists but isn't a non-empty list of price entries.
error.entries_not_dicts: Each price entry must be an object/dict.
error.field_not_found: The named field wasn't found in the first price entry.

abort.already_configured: Another configured EV already uses this name.

init.title: Smart EV Charging — settings
init.description: Update any field. Changes apply on submit without restarting Home Assistant.

data.actively_charging_values: Status values that mean actively charging
data.min_minutes_left_in_hour: Skip current hour if less than N minutes remain
data.min_soc_threshold: Only charge if SoC is below (%) — 100 disables the gate

error.entity_not_found: Entity does not exist or is not exposed.
error.attribute_not_found: The attribute was not found on the entity.
error.attribute_not_a_list: The attribute exists but isn't a non-empty list of price entries.
error.entries_not_dicts: Each price entry must be an object/dict.
error.field_not_found: The named field wasn't found in the first price entry.

force_charge_now.name: Force charge now
force_charge_now.description: Charge immediately, ignoring the price plan, until target SoC or unplug.

duration.name: Maximum duration
duration.description: Stop after this duration even if target SoC isn't reached. Optional.

skip_until.name: Skip until
skip_until.description: Don't charge before this time, regardless of plan.

until.name: Skip until
until.description: Datetime when normal planning should resume.

set_one_off_departure.name: Set one-off departure
set_one_off_departure.description: Override the departure deadline for the next charge cycle only. Auto-reverts after the targeted deadline passes. Omit departure_time to clear an active override.

departure_time.name: Departure time
departure_time.description: HH:MM departure time for the next charge cycle. Leave blank to clear.
